heading: Options
body:
`equals` uses the following terms to construct a query:

| Field | Type                                                    | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Required? |
| ----- | ------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| path  | string                                                  | Indexed field to search.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | yes       |
| value | boolean, objectId, number, date, string, uuid, or null. | Value to query for.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | yes       |
| score | object                                                  | Score to assign to matching search term results. Use one of the following options to modify the score:boost: multiply the result score by the given number.constant: replace the result score with the given number.function: replace the result score with the given expression.For information on using score in your query, see Score the Documents in the Results. | no        |
